entry.description: Id of the entry node. Must exist in Nodes.

id.description: Unique-within-graph identifier. Matches edge endpoints by string.

version.description: Agent version. Null resolves to latest.

runtimeUrl.description: Absolute http/https URL of the remote runtime hosting this agent. Null = local (resolved via IAgentRegistry).

a2aUrl.description: Absolute http/https URL of a remote A2A-compatible agent endpoint. When set, the graph node invokes via the A2A protocol. Mutually exclusive with RuntimeUrl.

ref.description: Reference to a registered agent, for Agent-kind nodes.

typeName.description: Fully-qualified type name of the handler class.

assemblyName.description: Optional assembly name. Null when the runtime resolves by type-name alone.

handlerRef.description: Reference to a DI-resolved code handler, for Code-kind nodes.

input.description: Graph-state keys to read. For Agent-kind nodes, these keys become metadata on the AgentInvocationRequest. For Code-kind nodes, the handler receives a dictionary subset keyed by these names.

output.description: Graph-state keys to write from the node's output. For Agent-kind nodes, the agent must declare a matching OutputSchema with these fields; the runtime extracts them from the structured assistant response. For Code-kind nodes, the handler's output dictionary is filtered to these keys.

stateBindings.description: Describes how graph state projects into/out of this node's invocation.

interruptReason.description: Operator-readable reason surfaced on Reason; optional for Interrupt-kind nodes.

maxAttempts.description: Total attempts including the first. Must be ≥ 1; 1 = no retry.

initialBackoffSeconds.description: Delay before the second attempt. Must be ≥ 0.

backoffMultiplier.description: Exponential growth factor applied per attempt. Must be ≥ 1.

maxBackoffSeconds.description: Upper bound on any single backoff delay. Must be ≥ InitialBackoffSeconds.

retryPolicy.description: Optional per-node retry policy. Null (default) = no retry; the node body runs once and any failure propagates. See GraphNodeRetryPolicy.

nodes.description: All nodes in the graph. Ids unique within the manifest.

onTraverse.description: Side-effect applied to graph state when the edge is taken.

concurrent.description: When true, this edge participates in a fan-out / fan-in topology. All concurrent edges from the same source node fire in parallel; all concurrent edges pointing to the same target node form a barrier join (the target waits for all sources). Requires MafGraphOrchestrator; silently ignored by InProcessGraphOrchestrator, which is sequential-only.

edges.description: Edges between nodes, order-significant (first-match-wins when a node has multiple outgoing edges).

maxSteps.description: Hard ceiling on super-step count per invocation. Prevents runaway cycles. Defaults to 1000 (matching LangGraph's recursion_limit) when null. Exceeding this throws GraphRecursionException.

stateReducers.description: Per-key reducer overrides. Keys not listed here use the runtime defaults: messages appends, every other key last-write-wins. An explicit LastWriteWins entry overrides even the built-in messages append rule.
